lines.speaker: Piles
lines.text: Hello. I can convert items to banknotes, for 50 coins per item. Just hand me the items you'd like me to convert.

lines.speaker: Piles
lines.text: I'm Piles. I lived in Draynor Village when I was young, where I saw three men working in the market, converting items to banknotes.

lines.speaker: Piles
lines.text: Their names were Niles, Miles and Giles. I'm trying to be like them, so I've changed my name and started this business here.
